target:
(But no one knows the contact info.
How am I supposed to find them…?)

Hey, Shinpei.
Can you check this for me?

I forgot to mention it earlier…
When I asked Hizuru for the contact info, this was given to me.
I don't get it at all.

That's right, but
this looks like a code to me.
He's really strange…

(This is the contact info?
What's going on?
Just like Alain said, it's clearly a code---)

Sorry Shinpei.
I need to go to the bathroom…

(I've seen something like this before!!!
In Nagumo-sensei's "Drift," there's an
<color=#GF_TIPS_096>unbreakable cipher</color>---"Tammu Shudd"!!!)
(Now, the solution to this cipher is---

(This string of numbers…
It's a phone number.
I was right about the contact info!)

(It's not Nagumo-sensei…
A hoarse man's voice…
I've heard it somewhere…)

If you're asking for someone's name, introduce yourself first.
That's basic manners, isn't it…?

I'm Shinpei Ajiro…
Who are you…?

So… you're here already.
Faster than I expected.

(…Nezu-san!
The one who talked about the Shadow Sickness at Koba Mart before the first loop!)

How did you find out?
You… know this number?
Nagumo-sensei gave this cipher to Alain…

Y-yes!!!
There's a similar cipher in Nagumo-sensei's book…

In the story, the solution isn't revealed,
but it's designed to be deduced logically…

When I tried applying that solution to convert the characters…
It became an 11-digit number.
So it's probably a phone number…
You… are at the funeral hall now?
Then get out to the front.

(As he said, I came out alone…
But there's no one here?)

Um…
What should I do from here…!?

Like a scarecrow…
Just stand there.

Did you just shoot something?
Nezu-san!?

(He shot my shadow…
To check if I was a Shadow…!?)

Hizuru wants to meet.
Go to the Fourth Battery Site.

Hahaha…
Even if it's my own shadow, being shot with a gun…
That's quite an experience…

(Nagumo-sensei…
I'm finally going to meet you…)

Tell me your name.
I'll definitely save you.

(If I can work with Nagumo-sensei from day one…
I can defeat Mio!!)

(And why does Nagumo-sensei know about Shadows…
There's so much I need to ask…)
